title: Catalytic aerobic oxidative coupling of some simple phenols and natural phenanthrols with CuCI(OH).TMEDA
author: P. L. Majumder
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Department of Chemistry, University College of Science, University ot Calcutta, 92 Achaiya Prafulla Chandra Road. 

 Calcutta-700 009, India 

  Manuscript received 21 january 2000. accepted 6 April 2000  

 Aerobic oxidative coupling of phenol, catechol, resorcinol and pyrogallol with CuCI(OH).TMEDA as catalyst affords 2',4- dihydroxybiphenyl (1a), 3,3',4,4'-tetrahydroxy biphenyl (2d), 2,2',4.4'-tetrahydroxybiphenyl (3a) and 2,2',4,6'-tetrahydroxybiphenyI (4a) and 2`,3,3',4,4',5-hexahydroxybiphenyl (5a), respectively, in moderate yields. Similar catalytic aerobic oxidative coupling of the natural­ly occurring phenanthrols, nudol (6a) 12,7-dihydroxy-3,4-dimethoxyphenanthreneb 2,7-dihydroxy-3,4,6-trimethoxyphenanthrene (6h) and cirrhopetalin (7) 11-hydroxy-4-methoxy-2,3-methylenedioxyphenanthrenel Kith the same reagent gives the corresponding 1 ,1'- biphenanthryls 8a and 8c and the 8,8'-biphenanthryl 9a, respectively, in very good yields. All these reactions exhibit a high degree of regioselectivity.
